scenario: Duplicate charging notifications appear when one earbud is worn and the other is placed in an open, unplugged charging case.
description_clean: Repeat charging notifications appear when one earbud is worn and the other is placed in the open, unplugged charging case. Expected behavior: only one charging notification should appear since only one earbud is charging.
steps: Put on one earbud (e.g., left earbud in ear).
Place the other earbud (e.g., right earbud) into the charging case.
Leave the charging case open and unplugged.
Observe the charging notifications that appear on the connected device.
expected: Only one charging notification should appear since only one earbud is charging.
actual: Repeat charging notifications appear when one earbud is worn and the other is placed in the open, unplugged charging case.
